achievements.description: Collect every blue star in Tranquil Moon.

achievements.description: Collect every blue star in the first floor as shown in the Star Display.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Hide and Seek Outside
achievements.description: Collect every blue star in the Castle Grounds as shown in the Star Display.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.description: Collect every blue star in the first basement as shown in the Star Display.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Searching Upstairs
achievements.description: Collect every blue star in the second floor as shown in the Star Display.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Gates Can't Stop Me
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Chomp-Protected Town' in Course 1 without freeing Chain Chomp, getting a wing cap, or using a cannon.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Been Playing Too Many Hacks With Reduced Wing Cap Time
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Mario Wings to the Sky' in Course 1. If you get a wing cap, do not let the cap timer go below 40 seconds.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Cannonball to the Top
achievements.description: Land in the water at the top of Course 2 directly from a cannon shot, without sliding or bonking.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Quick Life Chase
achievements.description: Activate the chasing life shroom in Course 2, then get the star 'The Side Tower' before getting that life shroom, without entering different areas.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Funny Cannon Skip Returns
achievements.description: Collect the star 'The Lighthouse's Pole Reds' in Course 3 without using a cannon.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: I. Hate. Rust.
achievements.description: Collect the 80 coin star in Course 3 without swimming, getting a metal cap, or riding a Koopa Shell.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Cooler Way to Snowman Land
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Snowman's Amazing Hat' in Course 4 without using the warp on the snowman's hat.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Anybody On?
achievements.description: Find the squid beacon in Course 5. Try to jump above it, too.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Boo's Picky Landlord
achievements.description: Collect all 16 red coins in Course 5 while collecting no other coins.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Maximum Toxicity Blue Coins
achievements.description: Collect all 9 switch blue coins in Course 6.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: A-maze-ing Acrobatics
achievements.description: Collect the star 'A-maze-ing Emergency Exit' in Course 6 without entering toxic gas.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Puzzle to Get to the Cave
achievements.description: Collect the star '8-Coin Puzzle Cave' in Course 7 without pressing the A button.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: No Blocks to the Block Fort
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Secrets of the Forgotten Fort' in Course 7 without turning on the blue blocks or riding a Koopa Shell.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Really Climb Them
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Climb the Skyward Ruins' in Course 8 without using a cannon.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Switchless Floorless Dungeon
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Floorless Switch Dungeon' in Course 8 without turning the blue blocks back on.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: The Tight Cap Speedrun
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Dangerous Harbor Athletics' in Course 9 without getting a wing cap.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Jumps to the Upper Deck
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Poles to the Upper Deck' in Course 9 without climbing any poles. Missions 2-6 only.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Can't Touch This
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Snowslope Dungeon' in Course 10 without standing on the sliding snow mounds.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Keep Shredding Those Enemies
achievements.description: Collect 80 coins in Course 10 while riding a Koopa Shell in one go.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Express Underwater Elevator
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Express Elevator--Hurry Up!' in Course 11 while the water is at the highest level.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Desperate Diver
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Reds to the Not so Lonely Shroom' in Course 12 without using a cannon.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: How About Another Puzzle Skip?
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Red, Blue and Green Switches' in Course 13, pressing the red and blue on/off switches no more than once.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Picky Eater in the Cake
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Reds in the Hollow Cake' in Course 13 while collecting no yellow or blue coins in the entire course.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Hardcore Climb
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Blocky Spiral Climb' in Course 14 during mission 1.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Climb That Mast!
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Water-Lifted Cruiser' in Course 15 with the red blocks on.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Star Name Disregard
achievements.description: Collect the star 'Atop the Rainbow Spire' in Course 15 with the blue blocks on.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: His Tranquil Presence
achievements.description: Get to the BUP engraving in Course 15.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: No Need to Climb That
achievements.description: In the Wing Cap Switch Palace, land directly on the blue ON switch from far above, then fall out of the level to respawn at the top.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: What Current?
achievements.description: Collect the red coin star in the Metal Cap Switch Palace without getting a metal cap or turning on the red blocks.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Gone in a Flash
achievements.description: Collect the non-red coin gold star in the Vanish Cap Switch Palace while still wearing a vanish cap.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Submerged Door Knocking
achievements.description: Touch every underwater door in Wet-Dry City Big Run.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Let's Not Listen to the Sign
achievements.description: Defeat the final boss without wallkicking.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: The Golden Run
achievements.description: Collect every gold star in Farewell in one go without falling out or dying.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Here's Your Cannon Skip
achievements.description: Use the secret warp in the Castle Grounds.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: He Doesn't Get Enough Credit, Really
achievements.description: Find and get near aglab2's profile picture behind a signpost.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Frozen Memory
achievements.description: Find the Pixel Luigi in Snowman's Island.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Jumping on Buildings With Bro
achievements.description: Find the Pixel Luigi in Wet-Dry City.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Still a Paper Traveler
achievements.description: Get as close as possible to the Paper Luigi in Sweet Sweet Island.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Nice Viuwu Up Here
achievements.description: Break the UwU box in Shifting Sand Land.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Youwu Found Me
achievements.description: Break the UwU box in Wet-Dry City.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Nice Time Traveling uwu
achievements.description: Break the UwU box in Seasonal Mountain.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Overdue Rent
achievements.description: Collect 333 coins in Big Boo's Forest. No cloning coins.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: All These Coins, and No Ice Cream for You
achievements.description: Collect 333 coins in Shifting Sand Land. No cloning coins. Need UwU box.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Seasonal Stash
achievements.description: Collect 333 coins in Seasonal Mountain. No cloning coins.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Really Sliding Away
achievements.description: Beat or tie BroDute's slide time of 26.2 seconds in Cool, Cool Mountain.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Beastly Race
achievements.description: Beat or tie BroDute's slide time of 22.0 seconds in Slide Metropolis.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Mountain Slide Champion
achievements.description: Beat or tie BroDute's slide time of 38.2 seconds in Seasonal Mountain.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Smooth Silent Slider
achievements.description: Beat or tie BroDute's slide time of 33.9 seconds in Silence.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Breezily Beat BroDute
achievements.description: Beat or tie BroDute's slide time of 47.0 seconds in Death Wind.
achievements.author: Dimedime

achievements.title: Records on Fire
achievements.description: Beat or tie BroDute's slide time of 56.6 seconds in Fire Field.
achievements.author: Dimedime
